Bash(cd "D:\\personal\\scrapper" && python -c "
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
from scraper import BROWSER_HEADERS, _extract_ld_json_price

session = requests.Session\(\)
r = session.get\('https://www.dentalsky.com/solo-supra-needles-30g-short-100.html', headers=BROWSER_HEADERS, timeout=15\)
print\('Status:', r.status_code, 'Final:', r.url\)
soup = BeautifulSoup\(r.content, 'lxml'\)
p, c = _extract_ld_json_price\(soup\)
print\('Price:', p, c\)
" 2>&1)
Bash(cd "D:\\personal\\scrapper" && python scraper.py --limit 15 --sites dmi_ie dmi_uk dentalsky dontalia --no-skip-existing 2>&1)

Bash(cd "D:\\personal\\scrapper" && python -c "
import csv
with open\('output_prices.csv', newline='', encoding='utf-8-sig'\) as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader\(f\)
    for row in reader:
        code = row.get\('Code',''\)
        name = row.get\('Name',''\)[:50]
        dmi_ie = row.get\('DMI Sales Price \(€\)','N/A'\)
        dmi_uk = row.get\('DMI Sales Price \(£\)','N/A'\)
        ds = row.get\('DentalSky Sales Price \(£\)','N/A'\)
        dont = row.get\('Dontalia Sales Price \(€\)','N/A'\)
        print\(f'{code:10} | dmi.ie:{dmi_ie:10} | dmi.uk:{dmi_uk:10} | dentalsky:{ds:10} | dontalia:{dont:10} | {name}'\)
" 2>&1)
